headline: Is Uber Technologies (UBER) Still Attractively Priced After Recent Share Price Pullback?
summary: Wondering whether Uber Technologies at US$72.34 is priced for opportunity or already reflecting most of the story? This article walks through what that current price might mean for you as a shareholder or potential investor. Over the past week the stock is up 0.2%, while the 30 day return is a 1.4% decline and the year to date move is a 12.7% decline, set against a 1 year return of 1.0% decline and a 3 year gain of 125.5% and 5 year gain of 25.0%. Recent headlines have focused on Uber...

headline: Lucid to Receive New Investments from the PIF and Uber; Uber and Lucid Expand Robotaxi Partnership to at least 35,000 Vehicles
summary: Lucid Group, Inc. (NASDAQ: LCID), maker of the world's most advanced software-defined vehicles and technologies, today announced a significant expansion of its partnership with Uber, further supported by an additional long-term investment from Ayar Third Investment Company, an affiliate of the Public Investment Fund (PIF).

content.title: Lucid to Receive New Investments from the PIF and Uber; Uber and Lucid Expand Robotaxi Partnership to at least 35,000 Vehicles
content.summary: Lucid Group, Inc. (NASDAQ: LCID), maker of the world's most advanced software-defined vehicles and technologies, today announced a significant expansion of its partnership with Uber, further supported by an additional long-term investment from Ayar Third Investment Company, an affiliate of the Public Investment Fund (PIF).

thumbnail.caption: Uber and Lucid have agreed to expand their robotaxi partnership to at least 35,000 vehicles designed exclusively for use as part of Uber’s future global robotaxi service.

headline: Lucid Group, Inc. Announces Registered Public Offering of Common Stock; Total Raise of Approximately $1.05 Billion with Previously Announced Investments from Uber and PIF
summary: Lucid Group, Inc. (NASDAQ: LCID), maker of the world's most advanced electric vehicles, today announced pricing of its underwritten public offering of its common stock for gross proceeds of $300 million. The underwritten offering is expected to close on or about April 15, 2026, subject to customary closing conditions.

content.title: Lucid Group, Inc. Announces Registered Public Offering of Common Stock; Total Raise of Approximately $1.05 Billion with Previously Announced Investments from Uber and PIF
content.summary: Lucid Group, Inc. (NASDAQ: LCID), maker of the world's most advanced electric vehicles, today announced pricing of its underwritten public offering of its common stock for gross proceeds of $300 million. The underwritten offering is expected to close on or about April 15, 2026, subject to customary closing conditions.

headline: 3 Reasons Lucid Stock Is Jumping Today
summary: Lucid stock was in the green early, up 5.2% in early trading at $9.72, while the  and  were up 0.4% and 0.2%, respectively.  The move came after Lucid announced entities connected with the Saudi Public Investment Fund were purchasing $550 million in preferred stock.  Uber  also plans to expand its partnership with Lucid for 35,000 robo-taxis, up from 20,000.

headline: 3 Reasons Lucid Stock Is Volatile Today
summary: Lucid stock was in the green early in the session, trading as high as $10.09, before dropping to $8.78 in afternoon trading, down 4.9%, while the  and  were up 1% and 0.5%, respectively.  The moves came after Lucid announced entities connected with the Saudi Public Investment Fund were purchasing $550 million in preferred stock.  Uber  also plans to expand its partnership with Lucid for 35,000 robo-taxis, up from 20,000.

headline: Uber Announces Date of First Quarter 2026 Results Conference Call
summary: SAN FRANCISCO, April 14, 2026--Uber Technologies, Inc. (NYSE: UBER) will hold its quarterly conference call to discuss its first quarter 2026 financial results on Wednesday, May 6th at 5:00 a.m. Pacific Time (8:00 a.m. Eastern Time).

content.summary: SAN FRANCISCO, April 14, 2026--Uber Technologies, Inc. (NYSE: UBER) will hold its quarterly conference call to discuss its first quarter 2026 financial results on Wednesday, May 6th at 5:00 a.m. Pacific Time (8:00 a.m. Eastern Time).
